title: THE HOUSE EDGE
subtitle: Le Roulant Casino · 11:11 PM
epigraph_upright: The turn, the cycle, providence, the wheel under everybody and accountable to no one.
epigraph_reversed: Tilt, the wheel that's rigged, the cycle that's not a cycle but a drain.
scene_description: The wheel spins. The ball lands wherever it lands. The house always wins, eventually. You've been here long enough to know this.
direction_hint: Walk away when the wheel's still spinning, before it tells you anything.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Le Roulant Casino · 11:11 PM.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
